plugins.name: fellowship
plugins.description: Multi-quest orchestrator. Coordinates parallel quests via agent teams with structured research-plan-implement lifecycles and worktree isolation. Includes 10 skills and 2 agents.

plugins.name: fight-club
plugins.description: Adversarial code review plugin. Fights bad code so your reviewers don't have to. Includes skills for architecture, security, SRE, QA, and performance review.
